queries.question: Show all neighborhoods and their commute time where population is less than 10000.
queries.sql: SELECT name, mean_commute_time FROM Neighborhood WHERE population < '10000'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?mean_commute_time WHERE {
  ?neighborhood a :Neighborhood .
  ?neighborhood p:name ?name .
  ?neighborhood p:meanCommuteTime ?mean_commute_time .
  ?neighborhood p:population ?population_f .
  FILTER(?population_f < 10000)
}

queries.question: Show all neighborhoods and their commute time where population is less than 10000.
queries.sql: SELECT name, mean_commute_time, median_commute_time FROM Neighborhood WHERE population < '10000'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?mean_commute_time ?median_commute_time WHERE {
  ?neighborhood a :Neighborhood .
  ?neighborhood p:name ?name .

  ?neighborhood p:medianCommuteTime ?median_commute_time .
  ?neighborhood p:population ?population_f .
  FILTER(?population_f < 10000)

queries.question: Show all neighborhoods and streets, commute time there and speed limits where minimum speed limit is 30.
queries.sql: SELECT name, mean_commute_time, max_limit, min_limit FROM Neighborhood JOIN SpeedLimits ON SpeedLimits.neighborhood_id = Neighborhood.id WHERE SpeedLimits.min_limit >= '30'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?mean_commute_time ?max_limit ?min_limit WHERE {
  ?neighborhood a :Neighborhood .
  ?speedlimits a :SpeedLimits .
  ?speedlimits p:hasNeighborhood ?neighborhood .
  ?neighborhood p:name ?name .
  ?neighborhood p:meanCommuteTime ?mean_commute_time .
  ?speedlimits p:max_limit ?max_limit .
  ?speedlimits p:min_limit ?min_limit .
  ?speedlimits p:min_limit ?min_limit_f .
  FILTER(?min_limit_f >= 30)
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show all neighborhoods and their commute time where population is less than 10000.
Show all neighborhoods and streets, commute time there and speed limits where minimum speed limit is 30.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?name ?median_commute_time ?max_limit ?min_limit WHERE {
  ?neighborhood a :Neighborhood .
  ?speedlimits a :SpeedLimits .
  ?speedlimits p:hasNeighborhood ?neighborhood .
  ?neighborhood p:name ?name .
  ?neighborhood p:medianCommuteTime ?median_commute_time .
  ?speedlimits p:max_limit ?max_limit .
  ?speedlimits p:min_limit ?min_limit .
  ?speedlimits p:min_limit ?min_limit_f .
  FILTER(?min_limit_f >= 30)
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?name ?mean_commute_time ?max_limit ?min_limit WHERE {
  ?neighborhood a :Neighborhood .
  ?speedlimits a :SpeedLimits .
  ?speedlimits p:hasNeighborhood ?neighborhood .
  ?neighborhood p:name ?name .
  ?neighborhood p:meanCommuteTime ?mean_commute_time .
  ?speedlimits p:max_limit ?max_limit .
  ?speedlimits p:min_limit ?min_limit .
  ?speedlimits p:min_limit ?min_limit_f .
  FILTER(?min_limit_f >= 30)
} }
  full: { SELECT ?name ?mean_commute_time ?median_commute_time ?max_limit ?min_limit WHERE {
  ?neighborhood a :Neighborhood .
  ?speedlimits a :SpeedLimits .
  ?speedlimits p:hasNeighborhood ?neighborhood .
  ?neighborhood p:name ?name .
  ?neighborhood p:meanCommuteTime ?mean_commute_time .
  ?neighborhood p:medianCommuteTime ?median_commute_time .
  ?speedlimits p:max_limit ?max_limit .
  ?speedlimits p:min_limit ?min_limit .
  ?speedlimits p:min_limit ?min_limit_f .
  FILTER(?min_limit_f >= 30)
} }
}
